title: Shot in the Chest, Then the Neck — One Witness, Two Accounts

title: Cooper Brown — Man Who Stopped a Witness on Camera

Notes the contested, shifting identification; presented with attribution, not as an accusation.

title: Witnesses

Presented as open questions, not conclusions.
